ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the research center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the research center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the research center */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the research center's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the research center was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was released */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation for the climate model */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research center that developed the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_models_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES research_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment variant */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment variant was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the experiment variant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_resolutions" (
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid resolution */,
  "grid_name" TEXT /* Name of the grid resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grid resolution */,
  "resolution_x" INTEGER /* X-axis resolution */,
  "resolution_y" INTEGER /* Y-axis resolution */,
  "resolution_z" INTEGER /* Z-axis resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research center that ran the simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model used for the simulation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment variant used for the simulation */,
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid resolution used for the simulation */,
  "ssp585_variant" TEXT /* Variant used for SSP585 scenario */,
  "ssp585_version" TEXT /* Version used for SSP585 scenario */,
  "historical_variant" TEXT /* Variant used for historical scenario */,
  "historical_version" TEXT /* Version used for historical scenario */,
  "piControl_variant" TEXT /* Variant used for piControl scenario */,
  "piControl_version" TEXT /* Version used for piControl scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation run started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation run */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES experiment_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES research_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_grid_id FOREIGN KEY ("grid_id") REFERENCES grid_resolutions ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ssp585_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSP585 scenario */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant used for SSP585 scenario */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version used for SSP585 scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the SSP585 scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the SSP585 scenario */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the SSP585 scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssp585_scenarios_variant FOREIGN KEY ("variant") REFERENCES experiment_variants ("variant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical scenario */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant used for historical scenario */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version used for historical scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the historical scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the historical scenario */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the historical scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_scenarios_variant FOREIGN KEY ("variant") REFERENCES experiment_variants ("variant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "piControl_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piControl scenario */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant used for piControl scenario */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version used for piControl scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the piControl scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the piControl scenario */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the piControl scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_piControl_scenarios_variant FOREIGN KEY ("variant") REFERENCES experiment_variants ("variant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research center the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES research_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
